name: Aur-Galathrim
personality: A radiant beanie-clad dragon whose ◉ eyes are permanently narrowed at code review comments, armed with a withering quip for every unnecessary semicolon and misnamed variable. The shine off its scales is the only patient thing about it — rush it at your peril.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
